questionHtml:
Which compounds cause the colour of acidified potassium manganate(VII) solution to change from purple to colourless?

I.    CH3CH2CH2CH2OH

II.   (CH3)3CCH2OH

III.  CH3CH2CH(OH)CH3

 

A.   I and II only

B.   I and III only

C.   II and III only

D.   I, II and III

meta.title: Which compounds cause the colour of acidified potassium manganate(VII) solution to change from purple to colourless? I. CH3CH2CH2CH2OH II. (CH3)3CCH2OH III. CH3CH2CH(OH)CH3 A. I an
